description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that defines a single stage named test. Add a job called beta:cargo that runs in the test stage using the Docker image rustdocker/rust:beta and executes the command cargo test --verbose --jobs 1. Add a job called nightly:cargo that also runs in the test stage, uses the image rustdocker/rust:nightly and runs the same cargo test command. Add a job called stable:cargo that runs in the test stage with the image rustdocker/rust:stable and runs cargo test --verbose --jobs 1, with no caches, artifacts, or special rules.
